events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.

events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.

events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Ora Flame asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Drift Sand wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Drift Sand wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Ripple Tide dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
Ripple Tide wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
